My Work

Projects

Research & creative work built with curiosity and late-night coffee

↩ click to flip
🌊
PythonDeep LearningOpenCVGISComputer Vision

FloodSight

Complete

Seeing floods before they arrive 🌊

AI-powered flood prediction and visualization system using satellite imagery and deep learning. Analyzes geographic patterns and weather data to generate real-time flood risk maps with computer vision pipelines.

GitHub Live Demo Website
🌊 FloodSight

A computer vision pipeline that ingests multi-spectral satellite imagery and combines it with topographic GIS data to generate pixel-level flood risk probability maps. Uses a U-Net variant trained on historic flood event datasets. Real-time updates via an event-driven architecture.

✦ Key contributions

Custom loss function for imbalanced water/land classes · GIS coordinate projection pipeline · Interactive Leaflet.js risk overlay

PythonPyTorchOpenCVGISU-NetSatellite Imagery
↩ click again to flip back
↩ click to flip
⚡
PyTorchFlaskOpenCVPythonNumPy

Neural Eco Render

Complete

Smarter rendering through neural intelligence 🌿

A deep learning system that reconstructs high-quality rendered frames from low-sample inputs using a residual CNN. Estimates rendering metrics including render time, power, energy & CO₂ emissions.

GitHub Live Demo
⚡ Neural Eco Render

Residual CNN architecture that up-samples low-sample-count renders. A custom loss function combines perceptual loss (VGG features) with pixel-wise MSE. The Flask API accepts render config JSON and returns quality + sustainability metrics in real time.

🌿 Impact

Reduces render time by ~68% · Estimates CO₂ savings per job · Perceptual quality ≥ 94% of ground truth

Residual CNNVGG LossFlask APINumPy

StudyFlow

Complete

Your all-in-one study companion 📖✨

A productivity-focused study dashboard with Pomodoro timer, interactive flashcards, progress tracking, and task planning — everything in one aesthetic interface to build consistent learning habits.

GitHub Live Demo Website
📖 StudyFlow

Full-stack productivity app with Pomodoro engine, spaced-repetition flashcards (SM-2 algorithm), drag-and-drop task board, and study analytics. NLP module auto-generates quiz questions from pasted notes.

📊 Features

SM-2 spaced repetition · Auto quiz generation via NLP · Streak tracking · Session heatmap

FlaskSM-2 AlgorithmNLPChart.js

🖐
PythonMediaPipeOpenCVHead PoseHCI

Invisible Remote

Complete

Hands-free PC interaction powered by real-time head pose tracking and computer vision 🖐

Real-time computer vision system enabling fully hands-free PC control using only head movements. Maps natural head orientation (yaw, pitch, roll) via MediaPipe Face Mesh to tab-switching, clicking, and scrolling — with intent-based gesture prioritization and secure single-user detection.

GitHub Live Demo
🖐 Invisible Remote

Analyses head orientation in real-time using MediaPipe Face Mesh (468 landmarks). Yaw → tab switching, pitch → scroll, roll tilt → click. Intent-based prioritization prevents accidental triggers; single-user detection via face confidence thresholding ensures secure operation.

🎯 Key features

Real-time 3D head pose estimation · Gesture debouncing & intent scoring · PyAutoGUI action dispatch · Zero hardware required

MediaPipeOpenCVPyAutoGUIFace MeshHCI

🔮
✦ Capstone
3DGS · PBR
PyTorch3DGSPBRCUDAPythonBRDF

PhysiGS

Complete

Physics-based inverse rendering with 3D Gaussian Splatting 🔮

Capstone project extending 3DGS with a full PBR pipeline — decomposing scenes into albedo, roughness, and surface normals alongside a learnable HDR environment map. Achieves 25.33 dB PSNR at 173 FPS with zero-retraining relighting.

📈 +5.33 dB PSNR ⚡ 173 FPS ✦ 8,811 Gaussians
GitHub Live Demo
🔮 PhysiGS

Extends baseline 3D Gaussian Splatting with learnable PBR attributes per Gaussian (albedo RGB, roughness scalar, surface normals). A Cook-Torrance BRDF shader combines these with a 256×512 HDR environment map at render time, decoupling lighting from geometry for real-time relighting.

📊 Results

+5.33 dB PSNR over baseline (20.00 → 25.33 dB) · 173.1 FPS real-time PBR · 8,811 Gaussians · Zero retraining for novel lighting

Cook-Torrance BRDFInverse Rendering3DGSPyTorchCUDA
